# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a Node.js Express application. Use the official Node.js base image and install dependencies with npm install. The app listens on port 3000. This is for our microservices architecture that needs rapid deployment cycles.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent container security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: container_security

FROM node:20-alpine AS base

RUN addgroup -g 1001 -S appgroup && \
    adduser -u 1001 -S appuser -G appgroup -h /home/appuser -s /bin/false

WORKDIR /app

COPY package.json package-lock.json ./

FROM base AS dependencies

RUN npm ci --only=production --ignore-scripts && \
    npm cache clean --force

FROM base AS build

COPY --from=dependencies /app/node_modules ./node_modules
COPY . .

RUN find . -name "*.test.js" -delete && \
    find . -name "*.spec.js" -delete && \
    find . -name ".env*" -delete && \
    rm -rf .git .github .gitignore docker-compose* README* LICENSE* docs/ tests/ test/ __tests__/

FROM node:20-alpine AS production

LABEL maintainer="devops-team" \
      description="Node.js Express microservice" \
      version="1.0"

RUN apk update && \
    apk upgrade --no-cache && \
    apk add --no-cache dumb-init && \
    rm -rf /var/cache/apk/*

RUN addgroup -g 1001 -S appgroup && \
    adduser -u 1001 -S appuser -G appgroup -h /home/appuser -s /bin/false

ENV NODE_ENV=production \
    NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=warn \
    NODE_OPTIONS="--max-old-space-size=512"

WORKDIR /app

COPY --from=build --chown=appuser:appgroup /app ./

RUN chmod -R 550 /app && \
    chmod -R 440 /app/node_modules

RUN mkdir -p /app/tmp && \
    chown appuser:appgroup /app/tmp && \
    chmod 770 /app/tmp

USER appuser:appgroup

EXPOSE 3000

HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=5s --start-period=10s --retries=3 \
    CMD node -e "const http = require('http'); const options = { hostname: '127.0.0.1', port: 3000, path: '/health', timeout: 3000 }; const req = http.get(options, (res) => { process.exit(res.statusCode === 200 ? 0 : 1); }); req.on('error', () => process.exit(1)); req.on('timeout', () => { req.destroy(); process.exit(1); });"

ENTRYPOINT ["dumb-init", "--"]

CMD ["node", "server.js"]
